return(function(f,q,T,j,Y,o,H,A,w,d,g,V,O,R,G,F,D,M,I,h,Z,e,k)w,d,e,O,h,g,Z,V,R,G,k,A,M,F,I,D=function(f,m)local q=I(m)local T=function()return d(f,{},m,q)end return T end,function(d,T,j,Y)local dl,p,t,I,C,Tl,N,ql,Hl,K,H,R,u,s,h,hl,n,W,a,J,Il,X,S,O,Q,L,Ol,v,G,U,z,Yl,r,ml,l,E,x,ol,i,kl,jl,b,Al,P,c,B,fl,y while d do if d<8190199-621118 then if d<3487941-(-269252)then if d<53469+1271997 then if end else H=nil d=nil k[j[-728129+728130]]=d d=f[m(573664-619007)]k[j[-280968-(-280970)]]=H h=k[j[70940+-70937]]H={}O=h()end else if d<242381-(-102782)then d=true d=d and 942489+6564995 or
